creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
It helps, thank you!

2011/9/23 George Liaskos <geo.liaskos@gmail.com>

> Hello,
>
> It is a known issue, Chromium picks system headers and
> some compilation issues arise when you have protobuf
> from ports installed.
>
> The same happens if you have V8 installed, as a workaround
> try to remove protobuf.
>
> I am trying to resolve this issues, thank you for your report.
>
>
> Regards,
> George
>
